ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time of the game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "period" INTEGER /* Period of the game */,
  "postseason" INTEGER /* Whether the game is a postseason game */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season of the game */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., Final) */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the game */,
  "visitor_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visitor team */,
  "visitor_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the visitor team */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees at the game */,
  "game_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the game in minutes */,
  "game_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the game */,
  "game_version" INTEGER /* Version of the game data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the game data was last updated */,
  "officials" TEXT /* List of officials for the game */,
  "referees" TEXT /* List of referees for the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_visitor_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("visitor_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference of the team */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division of the team */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the team */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "established" INTEGER /* Year the team was established */,
  "general_manager" TEXT /* Name of the team's general manager */,
  "head_coach" TEXT /* Name of the team's head coach */,
  "ownership" TEXT /* Name of the team's ownership group */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the team's stadium */,
  "team_value" TEXT /* Estimated value of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "arenas" (
  "arena_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each arena */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the arena */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the arena is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the arena is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the arena is located */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the arena */,
  "opened" INTEGER /* Year the arena was opened */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the arena */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* Geographic coordinates of the arena */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("arena_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_arenas" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "arena_id" INTEGER /* ID of the arena where the game is played */,
  "arena_name" TEXT /* Name of the arena where the game is played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_arenas_arena_id FOREIGN KEY ("arena_id") REFERENCES arenas ("arena_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the player */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the player */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_stats" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the team */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Total rebounds by the team */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total assists by the team */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Total steals by the team */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Total blocks by the team */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Total turnovers by the team */,
  "field_goals" INTEGER /* Total field goals made by the team */,
  "three_pointers" INTEGER /* Total three-pointers made by the team */,
  "free_throws" INTEGER /* Total free throws made by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id", "team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Minutes played by the player */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Rebounds by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists by the player */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Steals by the player */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Blocks by the player */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Turnovers by the player */,
  "field_goals" INTEGER /* Field goals made by the player */,
  "three_pointers" INTEGER /* Three-pointers made by the player */,
  "free_throws" INTEGER /* Free throws made by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id", "player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, coach, administrator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table */,
  "read_access" INTEGER /* Whether the user has read access to the table */,
  "write_access" INTEGER /* Whether the user has write access to the table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "table_name")
)
